top_signals.title: OpenAI says it's engaging 'constructively' with state AGs about concerns
top_signals.summary: The Wall Street Journal reported that a coalition of state attorneys general have opened an investigation into OpenAI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
